attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking patterns. Limited observations show recovery ability rather than proactive aggression.
team_tactics: UAE employs offensive breakaway placement strategy to control race dynamics and protect leadership position.
terrain_preference: Exposed on technical climbing surfaces, particularly cobbled climbs where bike handling and power application differ from standard gradients.
vulnerability: Technical climbing terrain, especially cobbled or irregular surfaces where initial struggles are evident before finding rhythm.
key_patterns: Struggles initially on technical climbs but shows recovery capacity within same effort.
Benefits from UAE team's proactive race control through breakaway management tactics.
form_trajectory: neutral: Single race shows mixed signals - vulnerabilities exposed but sufficient form to take/hold pink jersey
